NO other APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modification. Plaintiff Philip Millenbah's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories as to defendants Gregory Burke and Burke - Molina.
The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories as to defendants Gregory Burke and Burke - Molina is moot as further responses have been provided. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of said responses. The Court finds that defendant asserted unmeritorious objections.
MODIFICATION: Monetary sanctions in the amount of $940 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
